scene_description:
### Foreground
- The front section of a vehicle is centered at the bottom of the image, featuring a black hood with motion blur on its surface and a rectangular camera unit mounted on top.  

### Road Surface & Markings (immediately behind the vehicle)
- A two-lane asphalt road extends forward, curving slightly to the right. It has a solid white center line, white edge lines, and a dark gray concrete curb on the left edge (with a drainage channel). The right edge of the road is bordered by a continuous silver metal guardrail with a curved profile. The road surface shows minor wear, with patches of grass along the left edge.  

### Left Foreground to Midground
- A sloped embankment (left side of the road) rises steeply, covered in dense green vegetation. This includes grass, shrubs, and small trees, with patches of exposed soil. The vegetation is lush and extends upward from the road.  

### Right Foreground to Midground
- A silver metal guardrail runs parallel to the right edge of the road, extending into the distance. Behind the guardrail:  
  - A weathered wooden utility pole (cylindrical, vertical) stands on the right edge of the road (right foreground), with multiple black power lines running horizontally from it. The pole has a crossbar for the wires, but insulators and transformers are not visible.  
  - Tall grass, dense shrubs, and trees fill the area behind the guardrail. A dark-colored vehicle is partially visible in the center background, obscured by the vegetation.  

### Midground to Background
- The road continues curving through a densely forested area. The background features hilly terrain covered in thick, lush green trees and undergrowth (including broadleaf and tall trees). The hills rise on both sides of the road, with dense vegetation covering the slopes. The sky is overcast with gray clouds.  

### Other Elements
- **Text & Signs**: No visible text, signs, banners, or stickers in the image.  
- **Vehicles & Plates**: The vehicle in the foreground (Google Street View car) has no visible license plate. The dark vehicle in the center background (right side) is obscured by vegetation, with no license plate visible.  
- **Infrastructure**: No traffic lights, fire hydrants, or additional bollards/barriers are visible. A tall, thin metal street lamp pole (center background, right side) is present but the lamp head is not clearly visible.  
- **Buildings & Architecture**: No buildings or architectural structures are visible.  
- **Vegetation & Terrain**: Dense green vegetation (grasses, shrubs, trees) covers all non-road areas; the terrain is hilly with the road winding through the slopes.  
- **Driving Side**: The road has a solid white center line and a guardrail on the right edge (from the vehicle’s perspective), indicating left-hand traffic.

details.name: white center line
details.reason: The presence of a white center line combined with the road layout helps identify the driving side.

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: Wooden poles are common infrastructure in many specific regions like Southeast Asia or parts of South America.
details.focused_description: A wooden utility pole is visible. It is tall, cylindrical, and vertically oriented. The wood has a weathered appearance with a mix of gray and brown tones, showing signs of aging and exposure (e.g., surface cracks, faded areas, and patches of discoloration). The pole’s surface is rough, and some lower sections are partially covered by green foliage (vines or ivy). No text is visible on the pole. The material is wood, and its condition indicates prolonged exposure to the elements.

details.name: metal guardrail
details.reason: The silver metal guardrail is a specific road safety feature used to identify road infrastructure.

details.name: concrete curb
details.reason: The dark gray concrete curb on the left side is a specific road edge feature.
details.focused_description: The concrete curb is a narrow, rectangular structure running parallel to the paved road on the left side of the image. It is made of concrete, with a dark gray color. The curb is in good condition, showing no significant cracks or damage. It has a smooth surface and no visible text or markings.
